# SkillGod — Project Skills & Memory

<!-- Auto-generated by SkillGod (sg init). Do not edit the SkillGod memory block; digests refresh it. -->

SkillGod provides curated coding skills and persistent project memory for this repo.

## Always apply
- Verify output matches the request before saying done
- Validate inputs before any database write
- Never silently ignore errors; use absolute imports
- Prefer existing project patterns over inventing new ones

## Memory
Decisions from prior sessions appear in the SkillGod memory block below (and in
AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md). Treat them as established project history.

## CLI helpers (run in the project terminal)
- `sg inject "<task>"` — print injected skills + memory (before coding)
- `sg capture --task "<task>" --output "<summary>"` — save turn memory (after coding)
- `sg find "<task>"` — which skills apply
- `sg remember "decision: …"` — save a key decision
- `sg timeline` — project memory timeline
- `sg stats` — vault health
